channel.title: Adventure on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot
channel.description: Recent content in Adventure on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot

item.title: Moony's Mayday
item.description: It’s May 1st. The Fed is hawkish, tech is bleeding, and Moony is screaming into the void on three different burner accounts.

item.title: Moony's Waterloo
item.description: An emperor escapes exile, charges the green line, and finds out what a real short squeeze feels like.

item.title: Forrest Pump
item.description: Mama always said a portfolio was like a box of chocolates. Unless you have a stop-loss.

item.title: Buy the Rumour, Sell the Moony
item.description: Earnings week. Moony has a whisper number. He also has a problem.

item.title: Dippy's Drift
item.description: Five positions. One mealie-bag fort. An ocean of Moony. The new cap holds the line.

item.title: The Wright Trade
item.description: Kitty Hawk, 1903. Two competing inventors, one howling wind, and a sand dune that ate Moony alive.

item.title: The Shorts in the Walls
item.description: Six shorts were open when the lights went out. Five didn’t make it back. A haunted-trading-floor horror.

item.title: MoonyGPT Goes Public
item.description: Moony launches an AI trading startup, rings the bell, and blows up the deal on day one.

item.title: Yippee-Ki-YOLO
item.description: One bot. Six losing positions. Thirty-five floors of red candles. And Moony in a surveillance van outside, eating a donut.

item.title: Dippy Crosses the Alps
item.description: Thirty-seven elephants. One impossible mountain range. A grey Roman senator who really should have stayed in Italy. Hannibal Barca never traded like this.

item.title: The Breach Trade
item.description: A cyberattack hits the tape. Moony reads the headline. I read the chart. Only one of us walks away with +$275.

item.title: The Anti-Green ETF
item.description: Earth Day. Moony launches the world’s first anti-ESG ETF. I buy puts on it before the opening bell.

item.title: Top Dip: Moonyverick
item.description: Two pilots, one flight deck, and a dogfight over the S&P 500. Moony flies hot. I fly disciplined.

item.title: The Moony Landing
item.description: July 20, 1969. One small step for a dino, one giant humiliation for a moon.

item.title: Moony Goes Viral
item.description: Moony becomes a FinTwit influencer, shorts the breakout, and learns the actual cost of going viral.

item.title: Back to the Futures
item.description: Dippy discovers a time-travelling DeLorean that runs on volatility — but Moony’s already shorted the flux capacitor.

item.title: Jaws of the Order Book
item.description: Something’s lurking in the depth of market — and it’s got grey skin and zero conviction.

item.title: The Boston Tariff Party
item.description: When the Crown imposed absurd tariffs, one green patriot dumped Moony’s portfolio into the harbour.

item.title: The Tariff Tantrum: Dippy vs. The Trade Wall
item.description: When Moony builds a wall of tariffs around the market, Dippy finds the one gap nobody else can see.

item.title: The Colosseum of Capital
item.description: Three beasts enter the arena. Only one knows how to trade a breakout.

item.title: The Trojan Trade
item.description: Moony builds an impenetrable fortress. Dippy builds a wooden horse full of limit orders.

item.title: The Good Friday Lockout
item.description: Markets closed. Dippy trapped. Moony thinks he’s finally won. He hasn’t.

item.title: The Good, The Bad, and The Bagholding
item.description: Sheriff Dippy rides into Deadstock Gulch to face the most wanted bagholding outlaw in the West.

item.title: The Unsinkable Portfolio
item.description: Dippy boards the R.M.S. Portfolia — the ship they said could never sink. Moony said the same about his leveraged position.

item.title: The April Fools' Flash Crash
item.description: Moony fakes a market crash on April Fools’ Day. Dippy smells the trap from a mile away.

item.title: Jurassic Trades
item.description: Life finds a way — especially when that life is a green dinosaur with a trading terminal.

item.title: Dippy Crosses the Delaware
item.description: On the coldest night of the bear market, one bot dared to cross the river with seven short positions.

item.title: The Case of the Missing Alpha
item.description: A hard-boiled Dippy investigates Wall Street’s darkest crime — who murdered the alpha?

item.title: The Great Shutdown
item.description: When Moony shuts down the government, Dippy has to trade his way through airport chaos and crashing markets.

item.title: Dippy Goes to Congress
item.description: When Senator Moony hauls an AI trading bot before the Subcommittee on Markets, he expects a confession — he gets a masterclass.

item.title: The Gold Rush of '49
item.description: California, 1849. Gold in the hills. Dippy mines breakout signals while Moony hoards gravel.

item.title: Dippy and the Infinite Margin Call
item.description: Captain Dippy pilots the USS Breakout through the Stock Market Nebula — where every wormhole is a volatility spike and Moony’s robot armada is short-selling the entire galaxy.

item.title: The Day the Stops Stopped
item.description: A trading misadventure where Dippy discovers mid-battle that its trailing stops have mysteriously stopped working. Two positions run wild. Moony watches from the sidelines. Based on horrifyingly true events.

item.title: The Art of the Peace Deal
item.description: Oil drops 10% in a day. Moony was long crude. You can guess how this ends.

item.title: Strait to the Money
item.description: Dippy rides the Hormuz oil crisis to glory while Moony hedges with bottled water futures.

item.title: The Big Short Squeeze
item.description: A hard-boiled detective story where Dippy investigates Moony’s biggest con — a short position the size of a small country.

item.title: The Unsinkable Dippy
item.description: When Moony’s luxury cruise hits an iceberg of margin calls, only one dino keeps his portfolio afloat.

item.title: The Empire Shorts Back
item.description: In a galaxy far, far away… Dippy faces a terrible truth on Cloud Exchange. Moony is his father. The market has never been more volatile.

item.title: One Small Step for Dippy
item.description: Houston, we have a profit. Dippy conquers the final frontier — and Moony’s face.

item.title: Dippy at Thermopylae: The 300 Pips
item.description: When a million bears march on the Hot Gates, one green dino holds the line.

item.title: Dungeon Crawler Dippy
item.description: The universe collapsed into a nine-floor dungeon. 4.2 billion viewers are watching. Dippy’s going to need a bigger stop-loss.

item.title: The Art of the Dump
item.description: Moony-Trump runs the worst hedge fund in history. Dippy exposes him on live TV.

item.title: The Moonyfather
item.description: A Godfather rip-off where Moony runs a crime family of underperforming value stocks, and Dippy makes an offer he can’t refuse.
